summary: BGMI tournament registration app with Internet Identity authentication. User wants Google, Apple, Microsoft, and Passkey login options displayed directly on both the Register (Step 2 Authenticate) screen and the Login page, instead of a single 'Verify with Internet Identity' button.
architectural_notes: Authentication uses Internet Identity (id.ai) — Google, Apple, Microsoft, and Passkey options should be surfaced directly in the app UI rather than relying on the id.ai redirect page
known_issues: Step 2 currently shows 'Authentication cancelled or failed' error when Internet Identity popup is blocked or closed prematurely

existing_features.title: On the Register page Step 2 (Authenticate screen), replace the single 'Verify with Internet Identity' button with four distinct authentication option buttons matching the Internet Identity (id.ai) UI: a Google button (with Google 'G' logo), an Apple button (with Apple logo), a Microsoft button (with Microsoft colored squares logo), and a 'Continue with Passkey' button (with passkey/person icon). Each button, when clicked, must trigger the Internet Identity login flow — the underlying authentication mechanism remains Internet Identity, but the UI presents these four options directly on the screen so users can visually select their preferred method before the popup opens.

On the Login page, replace the existing single Internet Identity authentication button with the same four authentication option buttons: Google (with Google 'G' logo), Apple (with Apple logo), Microsoft (with Microsoft colored squares logo), and 'Continue with Passkey' (with passkey/person icon). Each button triggers the Internet Identity login flow. The underlying authentication mechanism remains Internet Identity.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Google, Apple, Microsoft, and Passkey buttons directly on Register Step 2 (Authenticate) screen replacing single Internet Identity button
Add Google, Apple, Microsoft, and Passkey buttons directly on Login page replacing single Internet Identity button
